response.justification: While Sarah is an excellent full-stack engineer with strong communication and 16+ years of experience, she critically lacks the mandatory C++ expertise (appears to have ~6 months vs. 5-10 years required), has no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle experience, and shows no Windows platform specialization. Her finance exposure is limited to one role (RIDE Capital) without capital markets or fixed-income domain depth. The role's specialist requirements in Windows-based C++ development and enterprise databases are not met.
strengths: Excellent communication and teaching skills, demonstrated through multiple workshops and open-source leadership
Strong technical breadth across multiple languages and platforms shows adaptability and problem-solving capabilities
Some investment/fintech exposure from RIDE Capital role and proven ability to optimize performance-critical systems
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (estimated <1 year) falls far short of the mandatory 5-10 years required for this role
No indicated expertise with SQL Server or Oracle; recent work focuses on MongoDB and TypeScript, not Windows-based enterprise databases
No demonstrated Windows platform specialization or capital markets/fixed-income domain knowledge beyond a single brief investment-tech role
